# Extração: 03-10X Sales Funnel Action Plan 2.0

- **Tipo:** PDF

---

2.0
This action plan is meant to supplement the Sales Funnel Manual (10xdownload.com/funnels)
to make sure you’re crystal clear on the actions to take to get your desired results.
Keep in mind that there are plenty of people out there who know how to build funnels, so you
don’t necessarily have to do all the work yourself. Also, when in doubt, refer to the manual!
Get a Funnel Launched and Make Your First Sale!
CREATE AN ACCOUNT WITH A FUNNEL BUILDER SYSTEM	STEP
1
You can use any system, but we recommend Clickfunnels because that is what we use.
• Sign up for Clickfunnels (10xresource.com/clickfunnels)
CREATE A CRM OR EMAIL MARKETING ACCOUNT (OPTIONAL	STEP
2
Since you are using the latest version of Clickfunnels (version 2.0) you have the
option to utilize their email marketing. CF2.0 features full broadcasting capabilities
as well as email autonotifier sequences.That said, if you already utilize another
system, or prefer another CRM you may integrate it with CF2.0 rather easily.
• Clickfunnel Email Integrations (10xresource.com/cf2sf21)
• Sign up for MailChimp (10xresource.com/mailchimp)
• 10X Email Marketing Manual (10xdownload.com/email)
SALES FUNNEL ACTION PLAN

DECIDE WHAT TYPE OF FUNNEL YOU WANT TO BUILD	STEP
3
You can create your funnel using any combination of pages to capture leads, make
sales and much more. While the options are limitless, we’ve provided 3 flowcharts
which are further explained in the Sales Funnel manual (10xdownload.com/funnels).
We’ve also provided “swipe files” that give you our funnels as real world examples.
• CF Building First Funnel (10xresource.com/cf2sf1)
• Appointment Funnel Flowchart (10xdownload.com/sf1)
• Appointment Swipe Files (10xdownload.com/sf6)
• Product Funnel Flowchart (10xdownload.com/sf2)
• Product Funnel Swipe Files (10xdownload.com/sf7)
• Webinar Funnel Flowchart (10xdownload.com/sf3)
• Webinar Funnel Swipe Files (10xdownload.com/sf8)
GET READY TO ACCEPT CREDIT CARDS (IF NEEDED)	STEP
4
You will need to have an established business (such as an LLC) to accept major
credit cards. The fastest and easiest solution is Stripe. You might also consider
adding Paypal as a payment option, but it is not needed.
Note that you can skip this step if you do not collect payment online. This is often
the situation with an appointment funnel. In a situation where you collect sales on
the phone or via invoice, Paypal is often your best bet.
• Sign up for Stripe (10xresource.com/stripe)
• Sign up for Paypal (10xresource.com/paypal)
• Set up Stripe on Clickfunnels (10xresource.com/cf2sf5)
• Set up Paypal on Clickfunnels (10xresource.com/cf2sf23)

BUILD YOUR FUNNEL PAGES AND PREPARE TO LAUNCH	STEP
5
It is highly recommended that you save time by starting with pre-built templates
and customizing from there. For example, the 10X Marketing Done-for-You program
includes pre-built funnels.
You will need to complete the following to get ready to launch…
Build and customize each funnel page
Set up a custom web address
Connect your email to store leads
Connect your payment processing
Add your products (if applicable)
We’ve created basic tutorial videos to help get you going (below). We’ve also
provided official Clickfunnels documentation on specific features or functionality
to use as needed.”
• Clickfunnels Product Tour Tutorial (10xresource.com/cf2tour)
• Clickfunnels Page Editor Tutorial (10xresource.com/cf2editor)
• 10X Funnel Setup Checklist (10xdownload.com/sf4)
• CF2.0 Adding New Funnel Steps (10xresource.com/cf2sf2)
• CF2.0 Domain Setup (10xresource.com/cf2sf3)
• CF2.0 Path (Page) Names (10xresource.com/cf2sf4)
• CF2.0 Adding Rows (10xresource.com/cf2sf8)
• CF2.0 Adding Elements (10xresource.com/cf2sf9)
• CF2.0 Adding Video Players (10xresource.com/cf2sf10)
• CF2.0 Adding Popups (10xresource.com/cf2sf11)
• CF2.0 Using Mobile Editor (10xresource.com/cf2sf12)
• CF2.0 Hiding Elements (10xresource.com/cf2sf13)
• CF2.0 Saving Sections and Rows (10xresource.com/cf2sf14)
• CF2.0 Creating a Product (10xresource.com/cf2sf15)
• CF2.0 Creating a Subscription (10xresource.com/cf2sf16)
• CF2.0 Creating an Order Bump (10xresource.com/cf2sf17)
• CF2.0 Creating an Upsell (10xresource.com/cf2sf18)
Having challenges? Clickfunnels Help Documents (10xresource.com/cf2help)

-- 3 of 5 --

© 2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
• CF Testing Your Funnel (10xresource.com/cf2sf22)
RUN TEST TRANSACTIONS ON YOUR FUNNEL	STEP
6
Run a few test transactions to ensure everything is working. Note that you’ll want to do
this on your live domain, not on a preview page (which is the link provided in the editor).
You should run tests on both desktop and mobile. To play it safe, it is also recommended
to have someone else run transactions.
• Clickfunnels Product Tour Tutorial (10xresource.com/cf2tour)
• Clickfunnels Page Editor Tutorial (10xresource.com/cf2editor)
• 10X Funnel Setup Checklist (10xdownload.com/sf4)
START DRIVING TRAFFIC TO YOUR FUNNEL	STEP
7
You can do this with organic (free) and or advertising (paid) traffic. A good first
step is to share your funnel on social media so your friends and family can see your
new creation.
• Clickfunnels Statistics (10xresource.com/cf2sf19)
• Clickfunnels Split Testing (10xresource.com/cf2sf6)
MAKE YOUR FIRST SALE AND CELEBRATE!	STEP
8
You’ve got to celebrate the little victories! If you take longer than expected to
make your first sale, try not to let it get you down. These things can take time, and
depending on what your funnel offers, it may take a little bit of traffic.
What matters is that you are now up and running. You will constantly be improv-
ing and getting better by watching the states and split testing.
